metaTitle: Wasp Removal NYC | Wasp Nest Removal | The Best Pest Control NYC
metaDescription: Safe wasp nest removal in NYC. Same-day emergency service available. Licensed exterminators. Free inspection. Starting at $100. Call or text now.
h1: Wasp Removal in NYC — Safe, Fast, Guaranteed
heroParagraph: A wasp nest near a building entrance, outdoor dining area, or playground is a safety emergency. Wasps are aggressive nest defenders and will sting repeatedly when disturbed — unlike honeybees, they don't lose their stinger. A nest that's tolerable in May becomes a serious hazard by August, when colonies reach full size and foraging activity peaks. Our licensed exterminators remove wasp nests safely and treat the area to prevent rebuilding.

faqs.q: Can I remove a wasp nest myself?
faqs.a: You can — but we strongly advise against it. Wasps release an alarm pheromone when threatened, triggering simultaneous stinging by dozens of colony members. Without proper protective equipment and the right treatment products, DIY removal attempts regularly result in serious injury. We handle it safely for $100–$350.

faqs.q: How quickly can you remove a wasp nest?
faqs.a: We offer same-day emergency service for wasp nests. In most cases, we can have a technician on-site within a few hours of your call.
